div.head: 225. Telegram 768 from GenevaSource: Department of State, Central Files, 611.93/9–2355. Confidential; Priority.
div.p: Believe it important O’Neill be well informed on substance my exchanges with Wang on implementation agreed announcement with respect UK and that he follow up at Peiping particularly with respect info on agreed announcement to Americans in jail, their freedom communicate with him and his ability interview them when US desires have facts case investigated accordance agreed announcement.
Would hope that prior next meeting I could have full info on whatever has up to that time transpired between himself and PRC this regard.
